title: Shorten five more CI task names
body:
Now that we know how to do it, let's go whole hog...

Inspired by suggestions from Chris Evich on #5387

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **jwhonce** You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @jwhonce` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Doesn't look like it worked. There's some funky interaction between `name` and foo_task and `matrix`. Not going to worry about it tonight.
